creator: g.veniamin@googlemail.com
text:
using pkg_delete do not delete packages.  this is dump ktrace...

pkg_install is latest revision.


 69862 pkg_delete RET   read 3139/0xc43 
 69862 pkg_delete CALL  read(0x3,0x28234000,0x1000)
 69862 pkg_delete GIO   fd 3 read 0 bytes 
       ""                                                                                  
 69862 pkg_delete RET   read 0
 69862 pkg_delete CALL  close(0x3)
 69862 pkg_delete RET   close 0 
 69862 pkg_delete CALL  lstat(0x80510d2,0xbfbfdc18) 
 69862 pkg_delete NAMI  "+REQUIRE" 
 69862 pkg_delete RET   lstat -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 69862 pkg_delete CALL  lstat(0x8051149,0xbfbfdc18)
 69862 pkg_delete NAMI  "+POST-DEINSTALL"
 69862 pkg_delete RET   lstat -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 69862 pkg_delete CALL  lstat(0x8050e70,0xbfbfdc18) 
 69862 pkg_delete NAMI  "+DEINSTALL" 
 69862 pkg_delete RET   lstat -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 69862 pkg_delete CALL  lstat(0x8050e70,0xbfbfdc18)
 69862 pkg_delete NAMI  "+DEINSTALL"
 69862 pkg_delete RET   lstat -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 69862 pkg_delete PSIG  SIGSEGV SIG_DFL
 69862 pkg_delete NAMI  "pkg_delete.core" 

(gdb) core-file /var/db/pkg/amarok2-2.0.1.1/pkg_delete.core
Core was generated by `pkg_delete'.
Program terminated with signal 11, Segmentation fault.
#0  0x2817e206 in ?? ()

corefile is empty...
also tried to collect from CFLAGS="-g".
